project: Alkalive - Social Media, Performance Marketing & SEO

brief: Refer to quotation

🧠 Campaign Note: Accessibility = Smart Move

Context:
EU’s making accessibility a legal requirement for websites by June 2025. Screen readers, captions, full keyboard navigation.....the works. It’s not law in the UAE yet, but let’s be real: they’ll likely follow.

Why it matters:
This is a chance to get clients ahead of the curve before it becomes a scramble.

How to use it:

  • Frame it as a smart upgrade, not a legal scare tactic
  • Improves usability for everyone
  • Shows they’re thinking ahead
  • Makes them look competent

How to pitch it in convo:
“EU’s making accessibility law by 2025. Not here yet, but smart UAE companies are already upgrading. Might be worth getting ahead of it now .....less hassle later, and it improves UX anyway.”

UAE target sectors for accessibility-focused campaigns:

  • Banking & Financial Services
  • Healthcare & Insurance
  • Education & E-learning
  • Government & Public Sector
  • E-commerce & Retail
  • Travel & Hospitality
  • Real Estate & Property Portals
  • Telecom & Utilities
  • Transportation & Mobility
  • Media & Publishing

brief:
Project Scope – Web Redesign with additional Features

A. Web Redesign

- Home Page

- About Us

- Contact Us

- Services/Courses

- Trading Tools

- Meet the Founder

- Best Trading Partner

- Trade Signals

- Community & Discussion

· The redesign aims to provide user experience enhancements making it much more interactive and interesting

Scopes Included

- Artworks/ Media assets

- Web Animations and Interaction (Limited only to Wix capabilities)

A1. Home Page

Includes:

· Header: Logo, navigation menu

· Hero Section: Engaging image or video for Forex traders

· About Us Section: Brief introduction to the Forex trading company/organization

· Courses Overview: Highlights of key Forex trading services or courses offered

· Featured Trading Tools: Quick links to Tools Created

· Meet the Founder: Brief introduction to the founders or key team members

· Community & Discussion Link: Encouragement to engage with the Forex trading community (Discord Link)

· Contact Information: Footer with contact details and social media links

A2. About Us

Includes:

· Company Overview: History, mission statement, and core values

· Team Members: Brief bios and photos of team members

· Achievements: Milestones, awards, and recognitions

· Philosophy: Founding principles and vision

· Commitment: Customer service philosophy and quality commitment

· Testimonials: If required

A3. Contact Us

Includes:

· Contact Form: Fields for name, email, subject, and message

· Contact Information: Phone number, email address, physical address (if applicable)

· Map: Office Location map (if applicable)

· Social Media Links: Links to social media profiles for additional contact options

A4. Courses

Includes:

· Course Descriptions: Detailed descriptions of each course offered

· Benefits: Key benefits and outcomes for Traders

· Pricing: Pricing structure (if applicable)

· Testimonials: Customer testimonials or success stories related to courses

· Connected to Wix Online Programs (If techstack will be wix)

A5. Trading Tools

Includes:

· Tool Descriptions: Overview and benefits of the trading tools

· Integration: API usage

· Tutorials/Guides: How-to guides or video tutorials for using Forex trading tools effectively (if applicable)

· User Feedback: Reviews or testimonials on the effectiveness of trading tools (if applicable)

A6. Meet the Founder

Includes:

· Founder Profiles: Background, expertise, and contributions (Full Bio)

· Vision & Mission: Founder's vision & Mission for starting the Forex trading company

A7. Best Trading Partner

Includes:

· Partner Profiles: Overview of partner brokers, platforms, or other broker technology providers/partners

A8. Trading Signals

Includes:

· Informative: Informations about plans and signals via VIP Trading Academy

· Offers: List available membership option via discord Platform

A8. Community and Discussion

Includes:

· Discussion Forum: Redirect To Discord Group Channel

· Events: Schedule of webinars, workshops, or live trading sessions for Forex traders

· Informative: Additional Information about the Community

B. 3rdParty Tools

B.1 Interactive Trading Course

Wix Online Programs, It provides the following:

· Interactive Courses with Video upload if needed

· Quizzes per modules/per section

· Certificate upon completion

· Admin Dashboard to navigate/check trainees progress

· Additional minor features are included in this documentation:
Online Programs: An Overview | Help Center | Wix.com

B.2 Trading Tools

· Lot Size Calculator – Calculation of potential trade size and risk management

· Usage of API to capture the proper forex symbol as well as its current position from market

· System calculation using the formula: (Account Balance * Risk Percentage) / (Stop-Loss in Pips * Pip Value) = Lot Size.

API to use:

API Documentation | Alpha Vantage

B.2 Trading Hours Map

· Informative page of trading hours for different timezone

· Database declared doesn’t need any API to capture

C. Techstack and Timeline

C.1 Wix Studio

- Frontend

- Backend

- Database

Development Time 3-4 Weeks (giving the API implementation full week to implement)
